pack_prompt:
Create ONE final premium Hebrew booster pack image for the educational TCG "אוספים עובדות".
Portrait 512x716 card-pack ratio, one pack only, full wrapper visible, no sheet.
Native Hebrew RTL text integrated into the printed wrapper itself, not overlay.
Text exactly: "אוספים עובדות", "עונה 1", "Angular", "10 קלפי עובדות".
Premium foil wrapper with crimped top and bottom, warm gold trim, turquoise accents, glossy toy-like material, rich lighting, original collectible booster quality.
Central original pack art for the domain: פיתוח ווב עם Angular.
No English, no existing brands, no watermark.
